content.query:
SELECT
servZips.ZipCode
,zonda.[Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[Windows_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[MSA]
,zonda.[State]
,zonda.[County]
,zonda.[City]
,zonda.[Total_Households]
,zonda.[Median_Home_Price]
,zonda.[Median_Year_Built]
,zipPerf.GrossSalesAmount
,zipPerf.RawLeadCount
,zipPerf.SoldLeadCount
FROM
(
    SELECT distinct
    [ZipCode]
    FROM 
    [EDW].[DIM_ERP_BRANCH_ZIP]
    where 
    OperatingCompany = 'FHI'
) servZips
,(
    SELECT
    [Zip]
    ,sum(lds.GrossSalesAmount) as GrossSalesAmount
    ,count(lds.LeadID) as RawLeadCount
    ,sum(case when lds.Sold = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as SoldLeadCount
    FROM 
    [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
    ,[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
    WHERE
    lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
    and lds.[OperatingCompany] = 'FHI'
    group BY
    [Zip]
) zipPerf
,[ODS].[MKTDATA_ZONDA_ZIP_CODE_INDEX] zonda
WHERE
servZips.ZipCode = zonda.ZipCode
and servZips.ZipCode = zipPerf.Zip
order BY
CAST(Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index AS DECIMAL (5, 2)) desc
,CAST(zonda.[Total_Households] as INT) desc
